---
id: delete-document-in-signature-request
title: "Remove an document"
description: "Delete the document with the `DOC_ID` from the `SignatureRequest`"
sidebar_label: "Remove an document"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/sign-api-v3/skribble-api-v-3

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Remove an document"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/signature-requests/{SR_ID}/documents/{DOC_ID}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete the document with the `DOC_ID` from the `SignatureRequest`
with the ID `SR_ID`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
